title: Heavy Spear
description: Retextures the Golden Spear into a Mace-spear hybrid. This pack is intended for the Heavy Spear Datapack
body:
Retextures the Golden Spear into a Mace-Spear hybrid.
This pack is intended for the Heavy Spear datapack, but it can be a standalone too

Heres a link to the datapack it's meant for to check it out!

https://modrinth.com/datapack/heavy-spear
